Argument Reference

  • compartment_id - (Required) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • name - (Required) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • result_location - (Required) (Updatable) Result delivery target for the schedule export.
  • schedule_recurrences - (Required) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • time_scheduled - (Required) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) Schedule description text.
  • output_file_format - (Optional) (Updatable) Output format for generated exports.
  • saved_report_id - (Optional) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • query_properties - (Optional) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Freeform tags applied to the schedule.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags applied to the schedule.
